skills.name: Barrage
skills.description: Shoot 3 arrows at once to a single target.

skills.name: Full Throttle
skills.effect_text: Final damage increases by CaptionRatio2 % when Critical hit occurs.

skills.name: Scan
skills.description: Apply [Scan] debuff, which is removable, to the target. When you give damage to the target under [Scan] debuff with a Ranger skill, Critical Rate is additionally calculated.
skills.effect_text:
Duration: 20 seconds
Critical Rate increases by CaptionRatio %
Cooldown decreases by CaptionRatio2 every 0.5 seconds when dashing

skills.name: Strafe
skills.effect_text:
Skill Range 130
Skill Factor SkillFactor %
Evasion increases by CaptionRatio % for 2 seconds

skills.name: Blazing Arrow
skills.description: Gives damage to the target by firing a slow arrow.

attributes.name: Barrage: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Barrage] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Full Throttle: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases final damage increase effect by 0.5% per attribute level when Critical Hit of [Full Throttle]

* Additional increase by 10% when mastering Maximum level

attributes.name: Double Take: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Double Take] by 0.5% per attribute level

* Additional increase by 10% when mastering Maximum level

attributes.name: Barrage: Knockback
attributes.description:
* Target knocked back when the third overheat is accurately hit

* Only applied on medium size enemy

* Knockback distance increases according to the attribute level

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: [Arts] Blazing Arrow: Frozen Arrow
attributes.description:
* [Fire] property changed to [Ice]

* [Freeze] the accurately hit target for 3 seconds

* Total skill factor decreases by 30%

attributes.name: [Arts] Barrage: Wild Throw
attributes.description:
* Cooldown decreases by 5 seconds

* When calculating skill damage of Barrage, caster's accuracy decreases by 70%

attributes.name: [Arts] Barrage: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Barrage] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Double Take: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Double Take] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Ranger: Swift Runner
attributes.description:
* Stamina increases by 20

* Recover 5% of Stamina when casting [Strafe]

attributes.name: Strafe: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Strafe] by 0.5% per attribute level

* Additional increase by 10% when mastering Maximum level

attributes.name: Blazing Arrow: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Blazing Arrow] by 0.5% per attribute level

* Additional increase by 10% when mastering Maximum level

attributes.name: Scan: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Scan]'s critical rate by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Strafe: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Strafe] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Blazing Arrow: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Blazing Arrow] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Strafe: Scud
attributes.description:
* Total skill factor doubles

* Temporary increase in evasion is removed after use

* Can be charged up to a maximum of 3 times
